_output_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — target filesystem path for the marshalled artifact.

_phase_status.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — workflow state (drives C4 requirements-table branch).

field_name.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Zod field path emitted in this column.

header_text.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — text printed in the header row.

width.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — preferred column width in Excel units.

type_hint.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Excel cell-type hint for the marshaller.

required.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — whether marshaller should error on null.

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — single column-layout instruction (first-class per C5).

_columns_plan.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — optional layout instructions (first-class per C5).

field_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — dotted path within the phase schema (e.g., "rows[].math_derivation").

introduced_in.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — schema semver where this field was added.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — reviewer-facing reason the insertion was made.

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — KB file that motivated the insertion, if any.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — methodology insertion (first-class per C5).

_insertions.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — optional methodology insertions applied to this phase (first-class per C5).

phase_number.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — methodology phase number (0-12) per plan §4.5.

phase_slug.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — URL-safe slug (e.g., "requirements-table"). Also the xlsx sheet slug.

phase_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — human-facing phase title (e.g., "Phase 6 — Extract Requirements Table").

schema_version.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — Zod schema semver (e.g., "1.0.0") for drift-detection.

project_id.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — parent project id; keys workbook + PDF filename.

project_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — project display name; rendered at top and used as xlsx workbook title.

author.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — emitting agent or human reviewer identifier.

generator.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — tool that produced this artifact (e.g., "product-helper@0.1.0").

revision.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — monotonic revision counter per (project, phase).

system_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — system name (from M2 Phase 0 intake_summary).

system_description.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — one-sentence system description. GAP: no M2 source; ingest-time inference from Module 1 metadata or agent prompt.

the_system.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Boundary — the system name as the boundary label (derived from M2 Phase 0/3 context).

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Boundary — external actor name (sourced from M2 Phase 3 ucbdHeaderSchema.actor).

type.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Boundary — actor classification. GAP: M2 Phase 3 actor field is freeform; ingest-time inference fills this.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Boundary — external actor crossing the system boundary (EFFBD data-block candidate).

external_actors.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Boundary — deduplicated actors across all UCs.

boundary.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Boundary — system boundary definition (the_system + external_actors[]).

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Functions — snake_case_verb_object name (from M2 Phase 5 steps[].action, deduped via Phase 11 merged_from[]).

description_hint.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Functions — one-line intent (optional; derived from M2 Phase 5 notes or agent-generated).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Functions > Provenance — UC.R-qualified requirement id (from M2 Phase 6 req_id).

source_requirements.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Functions > Provenance — requirements that drive this function (from M2 Phase 6 rows[] where source_ucbd matches).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Functions — UC id where this function appears.

appears_in_use_cases.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Functions — UCs where this function appears (from M2 Phase 11 merged_from[] dedup).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Functions — candidate functional-block seed for M3 FFBD.

functions.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Functions — full function-candidate set (from M2 Phase 5+6+11 composite).

use_case_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — UC identifier (from M2 Phase 3 uc_id).

use_case_name.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — UC human-facing name (from M2 Phase 3 uc_name).

function_sequence.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — ordered sequence of function names (from M2 Phase 5 steps[].action).

after_function.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — function after which the branch fires.

guard.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — guard condition label (from M2 Phase 5 alternate_branch).

next_function.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — snake_case function name the guard routes to.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — one branch in a branching point.

branches.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — ≥2 branches (guards + destinations).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — branching decision in the function sequence.

branching.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — branching points along the sequence.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — one UC flow (function_sequence + branching).

use_case_flows.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Use Case Flows — per-UC ordered function sequences + branching (from M2 Phase 3+5 composite).

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constants — SCREAMING_SNAKE constant name (from M2 Phase 8 constant_name).

value.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constants — constant value (from M2 Phase 8 value).

units.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constants — unit (from M2 Phase 8 unit).

estimate_final.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constants — estimation status. GAP: not tracked in M2 Phase 8; ingest-time inference fills.

owned_by.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constants — role responsible for the constant. GAP: not tracked in M2 Phase 8.

affects_blocks.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constants — functional-block ids this constant labels (derived at ingest).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constants — carried Module-2 constant (labels, budgets, targets).

constants.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constants — carried performance-budget + capacity constants (from M2 Phase 8).

index.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Cross-Cutting Concerns — CC.R index. GAP: not assigned in M2 Phase 3 CC rows; ingest-time assignment.

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Cross-Cutting Concerns — snake_case concern name (from M2 Phase 3 uc_name where uc_id=CC).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Cross-Cutting Concerns — system-wide concern (policy, audit, auth, rate-limit, etc.).

cross_cutting_concerns.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Cross-Cutting Concerns — CC rows from M2 Phase 3.

module_1_constraints_carried_forward.description: x-ui-surface=section:FFBD > Constraints — Module 1 design-space constraints (from M2 Phase 0 intake_summary extraction).

uc_id.description: x-ui-surface=internal:m2-handoff-ingester — UC id present in M2 Phase 12 operational_primitives.

operational_primitives_present.description: x-ui-surface=internal:m2-handoff-ingester — whether M2 phase-12-ffbd-handoff.ts emitted operational_primitives for this uc_id.

cross_ref_pass.description: x-ui-surface=internal:m2-handoff-ingester — whether this uc_id also appears in the composite use_case_flows[] (true = integrity check passes).

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:m2-handoff-ingester — per-UC cross-check between composite handoff and Phase 12 per-UC primitives.

per_uc_checkpoints.description: x-ui-surface=internal:m2-handoff-ingester — Phase 12 per-UC operational_primitives cross-check results.

total_functions.description: x-ui-surface=section:Project Overview > Handoff Summary — deduped function count.

total_use_cases.description: x-ui-surface=section:Project Overview > Handoff Summary — UC count (excluding CC).

total_constants.description: x-ui-surface=section:Project Overview > Handoff Summary — carried-constant count.

total_cross_cutting.description: x-ui-surface=section:Project Overview > Handoff Summary — cross-cutting concern count.

summary.description: x-ui-surface=section:Project Overview > Handoff Summary — aggregate counts for the ingested handoff.

ready_for_m3_phase_1.description: x-ui-surface=section:Project Overview > Handoff Summary — integrity gate: all cross-refs pass, no missing required fields, ready to begin M3 Phase 1.

description: x-ui-surface=page-header — base phase envelope extended by every Module 2 phase.
title: Phase0aIngestM2Handoff
